traditionalUsesEn: Traditional astringent bark for mild diarrhea and mouth rinses; tanning and timber tree.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell adstringierende Rinde bei leichtem Durchfall und Mundspülungen; Gerb- und Nutzholz.
cautions: High tannin intake can irritate. Not for prolonged internal self-medication.
historicalNotes: King of European forests; folklore and naval timber history.
cautionsDe: High tannin intake kann irritate. Not für prolonged innerlich Selbstmedikation.
historicalNotesDe: King von Europaan Wälder; folklore und naval timber history.
